message:
test(conformance): expand RENAME command edge case coverage

Add 20 comprehensive RENAME conformance tests:
- TTL preservation across rename
- Cross-type rename (list overwrites string)
- RENAMENX with expired destination (succeeds)
- Hash rename preserves all fields
- Source key deletion verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
